purpose: Extreme close-up of food texture. Mouthwatering, abstract.

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Extreme macro photography of {food_texture_descriptor} filling entire frame, dramatic side light revealing texture detail at sub-millimeter scale, warm rich color palette, hyper-realistic surface detail with all textures visible (bread crust, melted cheese strands, chocolate sheen, sauce droplets), shot on 100mm macro at f/8, no text, no watermark {cultural_constraints_injection}
anti_patterns: Avoid in output: full plate visible
notes: Intents: grow, harvest. Source code in research corpus: T43. Saudi adaptation guidance: Strong for kunafa cheese stretch, kabsa rice grain texture, baklava layered detail, brownie texture. Reference image: Required. Recommended frequency: 1-2 per week.
